details: DeepSeek page never loaded despite 400 Bad Request change. URL changed to chat.deepseek.com but page body remained blank (previous Gemini page content still visible). Loading spinner in tab ran for 30+ seconds with no page render. Same ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR pattern as other blocked services. The 400 change did NOT fix page load blocking for DeepSeek.
notes: Unlike Gemini where 400 fixed the issue, DeepSeek remains completely blocked. May need different approach or domain-specific fix.
